title: polygala chinensis var. normalis
intro: Polygala chinensis var. normalis, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-anxiety, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala chinensis var. normalis include reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. Polygala chinensis var. normalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, capsules, and tea, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
